description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-progress-ring` (T2-05) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-progress-ring/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, value/max typed as numbers, size typed, label typed
2. Accessibility — `role="progressbar"`, aria-valuenow/min/max, aria-label required, indeterminate state, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all values (0/50/100%), indeterminate, size variants, label display, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — determinate/indeterminate, all sizes, with/without label
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, SVG stroke animation, CSS parts (track, fill, label)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, SVG-based (no canvas)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-progress-ring/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-progress-ring — T2-05 antagonistic quality review
